_comment: MAINNET REQUIRED: PoR security parameters governance proposal.
_instructions: This proposal enables security-critical PoR parameters for mainnet.
These MUST be active before mainnet launch (either via genesis or this proposal).
1. require_leaf_hashes=true  — enables conclusive double-inclusion fraud proofs
2. require_da_commitment=true — requires DA layer commitment for batch submission
3. require_poseq_commitment=true — requires PoSeq sequencer commitment for batch submission
Without these flags, fraud verification is best-effort and inconclusive.
Submit: posd tx gov submit-proposal por_mainnet_security_params.json --from <key> --chain-id omniphi-mainnet-1
metadata: Enable PoR mainnet security parameters: require DA commitments, leaf hashes, and PoSeq commitments
title: Enable PoR Mainnet Security Parameters
summary: This proposal enables three security-critical PoR parameters required for production: (1) require_leaf_hashes=true for conclusive double-inclusion fraud proofs, (2) require_da_commitment=true for data availability verification, (3) require_poseq_commitment=true for sequencer ordering verification. Without these flags, fraud verification remains best-effort.
